siteDescription: We craft inspiring luxury interiors. From concept to completion, we turn spaces into lasting works of art.

whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to inquire about your interior design services
contactPageSubtitle: We would love to hear about your project. Get in touch and let’s create something exceptional together.
contactFormSubtitle: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
heroSubtitle: From concept to completion, we turn ordinary spaces into extraordinary experiences. Every detail is crafted with precision, passion, and purpose.
aboutDescription: At ART ZONE Design, we believe exceptional spaces tell a story. Our team of creative designers and skilled craftspeople work together to create environments that are both stunning and practical. With over a decade of experience in luxury interior design, we have earned the trust of distinguished clients across the region.
projectsDescription: A curated selection of our finest interior design projects.
ctaBannerDescription: Let’s turn your vision into reality. Contact us today to begin your design journey.
socialSectionDescription: Follow our journey on social media for the latest projects and behind the scenes.
servicesPageDescription: From the first idea to final delivery, we offer comprehensive design solutions tailored to your unique vision.

bentoFeatures.title: Design consultations
bentoFeatures.description: We start from your first idea and map a clear roadmap for your project.

bentoFeatures.title: Interior design
bentoFeatures.description: 3D designs that balance beauty and function with meticulous detail.

bentoFeatures.title: Supervision & execution
bentoFeatures.description: Day-to-day oversight of every detail to ensure results match your vision.

bentoFeatures.title: Furnishing & styling
bentoFeatures.description: Furniture and accessories selected to complement the identity of the space.

processDescription: A smooth journey from your first idea to a finished space.

processSteps.title: Consultation
processSteps.description: We begin with an in-depth consultation to understand your vision, lifestyle, and requirements.

processSteps.title: Concept development
processSteps.description: Our designers develop a full concept including mood boards, layouts, and material selection.

processSteps.title: Design & detailing
processSteps.description: Every element is refined with technical drawings, 3D visualizations, and detailed specifications.

processSteps.title: Execution
processSteps.description: Our team manages the build end-to-end to deliver the design to the highest standards.

zoomPortalFinalSub: From dining to living — we design spaces where details come alive
